creator: stephen@FreeBSD.org
text:
I get a similar error with poudriere on FreeBSD 13.2 with default settings.

...
====> Compressing man pages (compress-man)
===>   Installing ldconfig configuration file
===========================================================================
=======================<phase: package        >============================
===== env: 'PKG_NOTES=build_timestamp built_by' 'PKG_NOTE_build_timestamp=2024-05-11T15:11:59+0000' 'PKG_NOTE_built_by=poudriere-git-3.4.99.20240424' NO_DEPENDS=yes USER=nobody UID=65534 GID
=65534
===>  Building packages for openmpi-5.0.3
===>   Building openmpi-5.0.3
pkg-static: Unable to access file /wrkdirs/usr/ports/net/openmpi/work/stage/usr/local/mpi/openmpi/include/openmpi/mpiext/mpiext_shortfloat_c.h:No such file or directory
pkg-static: Unable to access file /wrkdirs/usr/ports/net/openmpi/work/stage/usr/local/mpi/openmpi/include/openmpi/mpiext/mpiext_shortfloat_mpifh.h:No such file or directory
*** Error code 1

Stop.
